---
title: Publications by research team members
author: "**Dr. Bjoern Braunstein**"
date: today
format:
  html:
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/jpswalsh/academicons@1/css/academicons.min.css">
        <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.5.0/css/all.min.css">
---

```{r}
#| echo: false
library(jsonlite)
library(DT)
library(htmltools)

refs <- list.files("json", pattern = "\\.json$", full.names = TRUE) |>
  lapply(fromJSON) |>
  dplyr::bind_rows()

saveRDS(refs, "refs.rds") # Save as RDS for faster loading in other scripts


accent <- "#E07B39"
ic_col <- "#E07B39"

author_fmt <- gsub(
  "Bjoern Braunstein",
  sprintf(
    '<strong style="color:%s;">Bjoern Braunstein</strong> <a href="https://orcid.org/0000-0002-5173-8916" target="_blank" style="color:%s; text-decoration:none; font-size:1.0em;"><i class="ai ai-orcid"></i></a>',
    accent, accent
  ),
  refs$author
)

author_fmt <- gsub(
  "Kirsten Albracht",
  sprintf(
    '<strong style="color:%s;">Kirsten Albracht</strong> <a href="https://orcid.org/0000-0002-4271-2511" target="_blank" style="color:%s; text-decoration:none; font-size:1.0em;"><i class="ai ai-orcid"></i></a>',
    accent, accent
  ),
  author_fmt
)

venue <- ifelse(
  refs$type == "conference",
  paste0(refs$conference, ", Vol. ", refs$volume, ", ", refs$editor, " [Ed.] , ", refs$publisher, " [Pub.], ", refs$location, ", Page ", refs$pages),
  paste0("<em>", refs$journal, "</em>, Vol. ", refs$volume, ", No. ", refs$issue, ", P. ", refs$pages)
)

pubmed_badge <- ifelse(
  is.na(refs$pubmed) == FALSE & nchar(refs$pubmed) > 0,
  sprintf(
    '<a href="%s" target="_blank" style="margin-left:0.0em; color:%s; font-size:1.2em;"><i class="ai ai-pubmed"></i></a>',
    refs$pubmed, ic_col
  ),
  ""
)

scholar_badge <- ifelse(
  is.na(refs$scholar) == FALSE & nchar(refs$scholar) > 0,
  sprintf(
    '<a href="%s" target="_blank" style="margin-left:0.0em; color:%s; font-size:1.2em;"><i class="ai ai-google-scholar"></i></a>',
    refs$scholar, ic_col
  ),
  ""
)

pdf_badge <- ifelse(
  is.na(refs$pdf) == FALSE & nchar(refs$pdf) > 0,
  sprintf(
    '<a href="%s" target="_blank" style="margin-left:0.0em; color:#fff; background:%s; font-size:0.75em; font-weight:bold; padding:0.15em 0.45em; border-radius:3px; text-decoration:none; vertical-align:middle;">PDF</a>',
    refs$pdf, ic_col
  ),
  ""
)

doi_badge <- ifelse(
  is.na(refs$url) == FALSE & nchar(refs$url) > 0,
  sprintf(
    '<a href="%s" target="_blank" style="color:%s; font-size:1.2em;"><i class="ai ai-doi"></i></a>',
    refs$url, ic_col
  ),
  ""
)

details_badge <- ifelse(
  is.na(refs$details) == FALSE & nchar(refs$details) > 0,
  sprintf(
    '<a href="%s" target="_blank" style="margin-left:0.0em; color:#fff; background:%s; font-size:0.75em; font-weight:bold; padding:0.15em 0.45em; border-radius:3px; text-decoration:none; vertical-align:middle;">Details</a>',
    refs$details, accent
  ),
  ""
)

award_badge <- ifelse(
  is.na(refs$award) == FALSE & nchar(refs$award) > 0,
  sprintf(
    '<span title="%s" style="font-size:1.2em; cursor:default;">🏆</span>',
    refs$award
  ),
  ""
)

refs$reference <- sprintf(
  '<div style="font-weight:bold; margin-bottom:0.3em;">%s</div><div style="opacity:0.8; font-size:0.9em; margin-bottom:0.2em;">%s</div><div style="opacity:0.8; font-size:0.85em;">%s</div><div style="margin-top:0.4em; display:flex; align-items:center; gap:0.6em;">%s%s%s%s%s%s</div>',
  refs$title, author_fmt, venue,
  doi_badge, pubmed_badge, scholar_badge, pdf_badge, details_badge, award_badge
)

datatable(
  refs[, c("year", "type", "reference")],
  escape = FALSE,
  rownames = FALSE,
  colnames = c("Year", "Type", "Reference"),
  extensions = "Buttons", # Ausschalten wenn der PRINT Button nicht benötigt wird.
  options = list(
    dom = "Bfrtip", # Ausschalten wenn der PRINT Button nicht benötigt wird.
    buttons = list("print"), # Ausschalten wenn der PRINT Button nicht benötigt wird.
    pageLength = 50,
    order = list(list(0, "desc")),
    autoWidth = TRUE,
    columnDefs = list(
      list(width = "60px", targets = 0),
      list(targets = 1, orderable = FALSE, searchable = FALSE, visible = FALSE),
      list(targets = 2, orderable = FALSE)
    )
  )
)
```
